analysis вЂ”
law a graft assembles one [[perennial]] plant from two chosen parts вЂ” the [[scion]] sets the variety, the [[rootstock]] sets vigour/size/resistance вЂ” rather than growing it from [[seed]]; the graft union is the moment the [[biological/assets|bearer-plant]] asset is created.
